'''Deadly Sight''' was a [[Force power/Legends|power]] of the [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] that focused the user's hatred into deadly energy.

==Description==
Deadly Sight was a [[Force power/Legends|power]] of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] that harnessed a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-user's]] fury and hatred and then projected them through an intense glare onto the victim. It would blister the skin and vaporize extremities.<ref name="Jedi Path" />

While it was once an extremely rare ability, even among the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], the usage of this ability exploded in the last decades of the [[New Sith Wars]]. The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] considered it forbidden for use by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]].<ref name="Jedi Path" />

==Applications==
[[File:Deadlysight.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] being dissolved by Deadly Sight]]
[[Darksider]]s could inflict pain and injury upon their foes merely by looking at them, causing victims' bodies to burn and smoke as they died. The user of Deadly Sight could damage entire groups of foes within their field of vision. Deadly Sight injured everyone that the user looked at, including allies and civilians; it is unknown whether it could be refined, especially because of its dark nature.

Tiring to sustain, it was inefficient in terms of the strain caused on the user's Force reserves, but was nevertheless effective in the right situation.

==Users==
The only known practitioners of Deadly Sight after the [[Rule of Two/Legends|Rule of Two]] was established<ref name="Jedi Path" /> was the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Sariss]], who used it in her duel with [[Kyle Katarn]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="Dark Forces: Jedi Knight">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>and possibly Kyle Katarn himself as well as his mutual apprentice [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]].<ref>[[Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]</ref>There may have been more users but this is left ambiguous. It’s possible those extraordinarily strong in the Force like [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] have the potential to use it but they were never witnessed using it.<ref>[[Midi-chlorian/Legends|Midi-chlorians]]</ref>
